description_long: This is a single athletic shoe with a streamlined, low-cut design and a predominantly dark gray color. The upper features synthetic overlays and mesh-like textures, with a unique dial-based closure system instead of traditional laces. The heel area displays the 'mont-bell' brand name and a small geometric logo in white. The midsole and outsole are robust, with visible cushioning and a slightly translucent section, suggesting comfort and support for urban walking or running. The shoe shows some signs of dirt and wear, particularly on the sole and around the heel, indicating it has been used outdoors. The overall construction appears durable, with reinforced toe and heel areas for added protection.
description: A dark gray athletic shoe with a dial closure system, synthetic overlays, and visible branding, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Rear-side view showing the heel, collar, and part of the outsole, with visible wear and the geometric logo.
description_view_1: Back-left view highlighting the 'mont-bell' branding and heel structure, as well as the textured midsole.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the dial closure system, toe reinforcement, and detailed upper overlays.
description_view_3: Front-left view focusing on the streamlined toe, mesh-like upper, and side panel details.
attribute_logo: White geometric logo on the heel and 'mont-bell' text on the lateral heel area.
